lastReleaseMessage: Restore dates.ts after a botched regex replacement in the...

barRaise.topFinding: Fourth consecutive identical cycle, tenth straight daily run, same single HIGH. The tree is byte-identical to 06-16/06-15 (same four modified files, same git diff --stat = 4 files/13 insertions/6 deletions, same two tracked .bak files, same three untracked entries). HEAD is still 890b493 (2026-06-13), four days cold, and main is level with origin/main, so nothing external blocks a commit. The uncommitted cohort is unchanged: a doc fix (CHANGELOG date corrections, DESIGN.md rebrand to Yes&) plus the FUSE git-safety subsystem (scripts/git-guard.ps1 and its wiring), which is the safety net sitting outside the repo where a bad checkout erases it. No new code signal because no code moved; the real finding at run ten is that the daily cadence is re-deriving one unchanging one-line ship recommendation. One release.ps1 run (or git add -A; git commit) closes everything and reverts the verdict to healthy.
